title: Stray
description: Lost, alone and separated from family, a stray cat must untangle an ancient mystery to escape a long-forgotten city.

title: Hogwarts Legacy
description: Experience Hogwarts in the 1800s. Your character is a student who holds the key to an ancient secret that threatens to tear the wizarding world apart.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare II
description: Drop into a globe-trotting single-player campaign or immersive Multiplayer combat.

title: EA SPORTS FC 24
description: A new era for The World's Game: 19,000+ fully licensed players, 700+ teams, and 30+ leagues playing together in the most authentic football experience ever created.

title: Mass Effect Legendary Edition
description: Relive the cinematic saga. Includes single-player base content and over 40 DLC from the highly acclaimed Mass Effect, Mass Effect 2, and Mass Effect 3 games.

title: The Last of Us Part I
description: Experience the emotional storytelling and unforgettable characters in The Last of Us, winner of over 200 Game of the Year awards.
